narrative:
Washington Twp township has 777 registered voters, with 52.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.8 percentage points.
